Grow a Garden 2 Wiki
Fan-Made Community Wiki

Plant seeds, harvest crops, and turn Sheckles into a stronger garden while your plants keep growing offline. Grow a Garden 2 adds guild rewards and nighttime stealing, so smart layouts, defenses, and seed choices matter from the first session.

Launched Jun 2026
130M+ Visits
803K Peak CCU
93% Rating
214K+ Favorites
